question: What is the status of the FAaaS Kiwi Project LCM Update OCIFACP Confluence project for this week?

path_b_routing_results.query: Create a pptx Kiwi Project LCM update slide for execs, matching the existing Kiwi slide style and using only the FAaaS Kiwi Project Confluence page as content.
Generate an exec status slide pptx for FAaaS Kiwi Project (include ORM status, RAG summary, schedule health, blocking issues, next steps, exec asks) sourced from the OCIFACP Confluence page.
Produce a new Kiwi Project update pptx on demand, formatted like the reference Kiwi slide, with content pulled strictly from the FAaaS Kiwi Project Confluence page.
Make a Kiwi Project LCM update pptx in the same layout as the standard Kiwi slide and populate it from the FAaaS Kiwi Project Confluence page only.
Build an exec-ready Kiwi Project status pptx (RAG, schedule health, blockers, next steps, exec asks) using the FAaaS Kiwi Project Confluence page as the single source of truth.
Create a Q3 roadmap slide deck for OCI Networking and include competitive analysis.
What is the current RAG status for the Kiwi Project?
Write a one-page Kiwi Project LCM update as a Confluence page (not a pptx).
